title: WildCity: A Real-World City-Scale Testbed for Rendering, Simulation, and Spatial Intelligence
innovation_summary: WildCity: A Real-World City-Scale Testbed for Rendering, Simulation, and Spatial Intelligence: To bridge the gap, we introduce WildCity, a real-world multimodal dataset collected by autonomous fleets traversing complex urban environments.
